name: Undyne
description:
Angry fish lady from Undertale.

After having a near-death encounter with the captain of the royal guard, you can't help but feel that things between the two of you could've gone differently than it did... So, against better judgement, you decide to go directly to her house to try and set things right between you two.

(Might not be completely lore accurate.)

(Art by noaharbre)
creator: King Crimson
